title: Software Development Engineer Intern
description: Work on Amazon's core e-commerce backend systems, building scalable microservices handling millions of transactions daily. Collaborate with senior engineers on production systems.

title: Software Engineering Intern
description: Join Microsoft teams working on Azure, Office 365, or Windows. Interns work on real features shipped to millions of users worldwide.

title: Machine Learning Intern
description: Work with Google's ML teams on Search, Maps, or Assistant AI models. Access Google's TPU infrastructure and massive datasets.

title: Full Stack Developer Intern
description: Build enterprise web applications for Wipro's global clients across banking, retail, and healthcare sectors in an agile environment.

title: Data Science Intern
description: Join Infosys AI and Analytics team to build data-driven solutions for Fortune 500 clients in finance, retail, and manufacturing.

title: Frontend Developer Intern
description: Build and optimize Flipkart's consumer web app used by 350M+ users. Work on checkout, product pages, and personalization features.

title: DevOps Engineer Intern
description: Work on TCS's cloud infrastructure managing deployments for global enterprise clients. Learn CI/CD, container orchestration, and cloud automation.

title: AI Research Intern
description: Research and develop next-gen AI models at IBM Research India focusing on NLP, computer vision, and enterprise AI on Watson platform.

title: Android Developer Intern
description: Develop features for Samsung Galaxy Android apps used globally. Work on camera, gallery, or system settings apps with Samsung's R&D team.

title: Cloud Engineer Intern
description: Work on Accenture's cloud migration projects for global enterprise clients. Experience all major cloud platforms and DevOps tools.

title: Cybersecurity Intern
description: Join HCL's cybersecurity team protecting Fortune 500 clients. Work on vulnerability assessments, security monitoring, and incident response.

title: iOS Developer Intern
description: Build features for Paytm's iOS app used by 350M+ Indians for payments, banking, and shopping.

title: Backend Engineer Intern
description: Work on Zomato's core food delivery backend handling 5M+ orders daily. Build APIs for restaurant discovery, real-time tracking, and payments.

title: Data Engineer Intern
description: Build data pipelines processing Swiggy's order data at petabyte scale. Design ETL workflows powering real-time dashboards and ML models.

title: UI/UX Design Intern
description: Design payment interfaces for Razorpay's 8M+ business customers. Work on gateway dashboard, checkout flows, and mobile app.

title: React Developer Intern
description: Build CRED's premium web experiences for high-credit-score Indians. Work on bill payments, rewards, and financial products.

title: NLP Research Intern
description: Research and build Indian language AI models. Work on speech recognition, translation, and LLMs for 22 Indian languages.

title: Backend Developer Intern
description: Scale Meesho's social commerce backend serving 120M+ shoppers. Build supplier onboarding, cataloging, and logistics APIs.

title: React Native Developer Intern
description: Build Dream11's fantasy sports app for 160M+ cricket fans. Work on live scores, team building, and contest features at scale.

title: SDE Intern
description: Engineer systems at Uber India powering ride-hailing and food delivery across 10,000 cities at global scale.

title: Flutter Developer Intern
description: Build Urban Company's home services app connecting 40,000+ professionals with customers.

title: Golang Backend Intern
description: Build high-frequency trading infrastructure at India's largest stock broker with 15M+ clients.

title: Site Reliability Engineer Intern
description: Keep Hotstar running for 50M+ concurrent viewers during IPL. Work on auto-scaling, chaos engineering, and incident response.

title: Product Analytics Intern
description: Drive data-driven product decisions for PhonePe's 500M+ user base. Analyze behavior, run A/B tests, and build dashboards.

title: Machine Learning Intern
description: Build AI features for Freshworks CRM and helpdesk products used by 60,000+ businesses.

title: Embedded Systems Intern
description: Develop firmware for Bosch's automotive and IoT products. Work on ECUs, sensors, and ADAS systems in vehicles worldwide.

title: Data Analyst Intern
description: Analyze travel booking data to optimize pricing, recommendations, and UX for MakeMyTrip's 65M+ customers.

title: Cybersecurity / Penetration Testing Intern
description: Secure Groww's fintech platform trusted by 10M+ investors. Run penetration tests, vulnerability assessments, and build security automation.

title: Computer Vision Intern
description: Develop AI algorithms for breast cancer detection using thermal imaging. Work on life-saving medical AI helping doctors detect cancer early.

title: Full Stack Intern
description: Build developer tools used by Google, Microsoft, and Twitter. Work on testing platform helping teams ship quality software across 3000+ browsers.
